item.title: Simbe Tally shelf-scanning robot achieves UL 3300 certification
item.description: As part of the UL 3300 evaluation, Tally passed more than 40 safety tests, demonstrating its ability to operate safely in retail settings. The post Si...

item.title: Vicarious Surgical faces NYSE delisting again
item.description: Vicarious Surgical faces NYSE delisting after its market capitalization fell below the required $15 million threshold. The post Vicarious Surgical fac...

item.title: 11 women shaping the future of robotics
item.description: The IFR said it hopes the list will give women in the robotics industry more visibility and acknowledgment. The post 11 women shaping the future of ro...

item.title: Tesollo and Techman Robot unveil robot for high-mix, low-volume production
item.description: Tesollo demonstrated its DG-3F-M articulated gripper with Techman's TM5S cobot arm for tasks such as bin picking and assembly. The post Tesollo and Te...

item.title: Dexterity unveils Foresight world model for truck loading
item.description: Foresight is Dexterity's physics-consistent world model, a real-time, transactable representation of the physical environment. The post Dexterity unve...
